mapper.sql: select coupon_id, template_id, user_id, title, coupon_type, coupon_value, min_amount_cents, expire_time, used, used_time, order_id, source, create_time from fish_user_coupon
mapper.select: where user_id = #{userId} order by used asc, coupon_id desc
where user_id = #{userId} and used = 0 and expire_time > now() order by coupon_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into fish_user_coupon (template_id, user_id, title, coupon_type, coupon_value, min_amount_cents, expire_time, used, source, create_time) values (#{templateId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{couponType}, #{couponValue}, #{minAmountCents}, #{expireTime}, 0, #{source}, sysdate())
